---
title: "Monseigneur Georges Darboy"
---

## Monseigneur Georges Darboy

**Dates:** (1813-1871)

### Description

Archbishop of Paris

### Biography

He was assassinated during the Paris Commune.

### Letters

- Letter from December 8 [1871]
- Letter from Aug 4th 1871 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
